docToUdf.uploadHint: Drag and drop or click to add your DOCX files
docToUdf.tip1: Convert your documents with this tool before uploading to UYAP.
docToUdf.tip2: You can add multiple files and convert them in sequence.

imageToPdf.uploadHint: Drag or click to add JPG, PNG or TIFF images

imageToPdf.successDesc: All your images have been merged into a single PDF.

pdfMerge.uploadHint: Drag or click to add your PDF files
pdfMerge.tip1: Use drag-and-drop to reorder the merge sequence.
pdfMerge.successDesc: Your PDFs have been merged into a single file.

pdfSplit.title: PDF Split Tool
pdfSplit.description: Extract specific pages from your PDF to create a new document.
pdfSplit.uploadHint: Drag and drop or click to add a single PDF file
pdfSplit.tip1: Page numbers start at 1. Use commas to separate multiple pages or ranges.
pdfSplit.tip2: Page order is preserved as entered.
pdfSplit.successDesc: Selected pages have been extracted into a new PDF.
pdfSplit.errorService: Conversion service is currently unavailable. Please contact support.

pdfToImage.title: PDF → Image Converter
pdfToImage.description: Convert PDF pages to PNG or JPG images. Output is downloaded as a ZIP file.
pdfToImage.uploadHint: Drag and drop or click to add a single PDF file
pdfToImage.pageRangeHelp: Single: 5 | Range: 1-5 | Mixed: 1,3,5-7 | Leave empty to convert all pages.
pdfToImage.tip1: PNG is lossless, JPG produces smaller file sizes.
pdfToImage.tip2: If you leave page range empty, all pages will be converted.
pdfToImage.successDesc: Selected pages have been converted to images. Download the ZIP file.
pdfToImage.errorService: Conversion service is currently unavailable. Please contact support.

tiffToPdf.hubDescription: Convert your TIFF/TIF files into a single PDF.
tiffToPdf.title: TIFF → PDF Converter
tiffToPdf.description: Convert your TIFF or TIF files into a single PDF document. Multi-page TIFF supported.
tiffToPdf.uploadHint: Drag and drop or click to add TIFF/TIF files (max 10 files)
tiffToPdf.tip1: Only .tif and .tiff formats are accepted. Multi-page TIFF files are supported.
tiffToPdf.tip2: Use drag-and-drop to reorder. Files are added to the PDF in this order.
tiffToPdf.successDesc: Your TIFF files have been merged into a single PDF.
tiffToPdf.errorNoFile: Please upload at least one TIFF file.
tiffToPdf.errorService: Conversion service is currently unavailable. Please contact support.

ocrText.hubDescription: Extract text from PDFs and images. Turkish and English supported.
ocrText.title: OCR Text Extraction
ocrText.description: Extract text from PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG, TIF, and TIFF files. OCR with Turkish or English language option.
ocrText.uploadHint: Drag and drop or click to add a PDF, PNG, JPG, or TIFF file (single file, max 20 MB)
ocrText.tip1: PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG, TIF, and TIFF formats are supported. Single file, max 20 MB.
ocrText.tip2: Language selection improves OCR accuracy. Choose Turkish or English based on document language.
ocrText.successDesc: Text was successfully extracted from the document.
ocrText.errorService: OCR service is currently unavailable. Please contact support.

batchConvert.hubDescription: Convert multiple documents at once. Download as ZIP.
batchConvert.title: Batch Document Converter
batchConvert.description: Convert multiple documents in a single operation.
batchConvert.tip1: Select conversion type first, then upload compatible files. Max 20 files, 20 MB each.
batchConvert.tip2: All converted files are downloaded in a single ZIP archive.
batchConvert.successDesc: All files have been converted. Download the ZIP file.
batchConvert.errorNoFile: Please upload at least one file.
batchConvert.errorService: Conversion service is currently unavailable. Please contact support.

Services.title: Our Professional Services
Services.subtitle: Project-based implementation and consulting: web development, automation, brand design, digital strategy. For subscription-based software tools, see the Digital Products page.

sosyal-medya-yonetimi.title: Social Media Management
sosyal-medya-yonetimi.subtitle: Strategic and Measurable Social Media Approach
sosyal-medya-yonetimi.content: Maintaining a consistent and professional presence on social media is one of the cornerstones of a strong brand identity. At ZYGSOFT we don't just produce content — we manage your brand's digital growth through platform-specific strategies, measurable campaign goals, and clear monthly reporting. From Instagram to LinkedIn and TikTok to Facebook, we take a data-driven, performance-based approach tailored to each platform's dynamics. Content calendars are built with your approval and every visual and text is crafted to match your brand tone.
features: Monthly Content Calendar and Approval Workflow
Platform-Specific Strategy (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, etc.)
Original Graphic Design and Video Content Production
Target Audience Analysis and Competitor Monitoring
Meta Ads and Paid Campaign Management
Monthly Performance Report and Growth Analysis

faq.q: How many platforms do you produce content for?
faq.a: Instagram, Facebook and LinkedIn are covered in the base package. Additional platforms such as TikTok, X (Twitter) or YouTube can also be included.

faq.q: How does the post approval process work?
faq.a: A content calendar is prepared each month and posts are scheduled only after your approval. Revision requests are handled within 24 hours.

faq.q: Do you manage the advertising budget?
faq.a: Campaign setup, audience targeting and optimisation are handled by us; the ad spend is paid directly from your own Meta or Google account, ensuring full transparency.

web-ve-uygulama-gelistirme.title: Web and Application Development
web-ve-uygulama-gelistirme.subtitle: Fast, Secure and Scalable Digital Solutions for Your Business
web-ve-uygulama-gelistirme.content: Digital transformation goes far beyond having a website. At ZYGSOFT we build corporate web platforms, SaaS applications, custom software systems, and automation infrastructure. Using Next.js and React-based modern frontend architectures alongside secure and scalable backend systems, we lay a solid technical foundation for your business. Every project is designed and delivered to meet performance, security, and user experience standards.
features: Corporate Website and SaaS Platform Development
Custom Software and Business Process Automation
Modern UI/UX Design and Responsive Infrastructure
REST API Development and Third-Party Integrations
High Performance, SEO Optimization and Core Web Vitals
Turnkey Hosting, Domain and Technical Support

faq.q: What technology stack do you use?
faq.a: We use Next.js, React, TypeScript and Node.js for our projects. On the backend we prefer PostgreSQL, Prisma and cloud infrastructure. Different technologies can be evaluated depending on project requirements.

faq.q: How long does a project take to complete?
faq.a: Corporate websites are typically delivered in 2-4 weeks, while comprehensive web applications or SaaS platforms take 4-12 weeks. We provide a realistic timeline once the scope is defined.

faq.q: Can I get support after my project goes live?
faq.a: Yes. We provide post-launch technical support and maintenance for all our projects. Long-term maintenance packages are available for ongoing collaboration.

marka-kimligi-ve-grafik-tasarim.title: Brand Identity and Graphic Design
marka-kimligi-ve-grafik-tasarim.subtitle: An Unforgettable Brand Story and Visual Identity Design
marka-kimligi-ve-grafik-tasarim.content: A strong brand identity is one of the most effective tools for distinguishing your business and earning the trust of your target audience. We systematically design every component of your corporate identity — from logo and colour palette to typography and brand guidelines. A brand system that appears consistent across digital channels, print materials and social platforms builds long-term recognition and credibility.
features: Original Logo Design (3 Concept Proposals)
Comprehensive Brand Guidelines Document
Corporate Colour Palette and Typography System
Digital Media Templates (Social Media, Web)
Print Material Design (Business Cards, Brochures, Catalogues)
Vector and Print-Ready File Delivery

faq.q: How many concepts do you present for logo design?
faq.a: The process starts with 3 different concepts. Unlimited minor revisions are offered on the selected concept. Our goal is to arrive at a result that genuinely suits the brand.

faq.q: What file formats are included in the delivery?
faq.a: We deliver print-ready PDF, vector files (AI, EPS, SVG), and PNG/JPG for digital use. The brand guidelines document is also provided as a separate PDF.

faq.q: Can you design only a logo?
faq.a: A standalone logo is possible; however, we recommend the full corporate identity package for a cohesive brand perception. It leads to a stronger, more consistent brand in the long run.

dijital-strateji-ve-pazarlama.title: Digital Strategy and Marketing
dijital-strateji-ve-pazarlama.subtitle: Data-Driven Digital Growth and Performance Marketing
dijital-strateji-ve-pazarlama.content: A great product or service is not enough on its own — you need a concrete digital strategy to reach the right people. At ZYGSOFT we build an integrated digital marketing plan by understanding your business growth objectives. We grow your organic visibility through SEO, reach your target audience directly with Google Ads and Meta Ads, and maximise the return on your ad budget through conversion rate optimisation. The entire process is made transparent through regular reports and clear analysis.
features: Technical SEO and Keyword Strategy
Google Ads Campaign Setup and Optimisation
Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and TikTok Ad Management
Conversion Rate Optimisation (CRO)
Google Analytics and Data-Driven Decision Analysis
Monthly Performance Report and Strategy Updates

faq.q: When will I start seeing results?
faq.a: Organic SEO results typically become noticeable within 2-3 months. With paid advertising (Google Ads, Meta Ads), you can access traffic and conversion data within the first week of a campaign going live.

faq.q: What is the minimum advertising budget?
faq.a: Ad spend is paid directly to the platform account. We clarify recommended minimum budgets during the first consultation based on your industry and goals; meaningful results are generally achieved with at least ₺3,000/month.

faq.q: Should I choose SEO or paid ads?
faq.a: These two channels complement each other. Paid ads deliver fast visibility in the short term, while SEO drives sustainable organic growth over the long term. We recommend an integrated strategy based on your goals.

hedef-kitle-analizi.title: Target Audience Analysis
hedef-kitle-analizi.subtitle: Know Your Customers Closely and Increase Your Sales
hedef-kitle-analizi.content: An effective digital strategy starts with targeting the right audience with the right message at the right time. At ZYGSOFT we conduct in-depth analysis of your existing and potential customer profile using demographic, psychographic, and behavioural data. The findings are converted into a concrete roadmap to optimise your ad spend, sharpen your content strategy, and shorten your sales cycle.
features: Demographic and Psychographic Segmentation
Customer Journey Mapping
Competitor Audience Benchmarking
Market Size and Opportunity Research
Persona Profile Creation and Documentation
Data-Driven Messaging Strategy and Communication Plan

faq.q: What is target audience analysis useful for?
faq.a: Identifying the right audience prevents ad budget waste and ensures your message reaches the people most likely to convert. Our analyses provide actionable data for both digital advertising and content strategy.

faq.q: Which industries is this service suitable for?
faq.a: It has been applied in e-commerce, legal, healthcare, education, technology, real estate and many other sectors. We use industry-specific data and methodology.
Depending on project scope, a comprehensive analysis report and action plan is delivered within 5-10 business days.

About.title: About Us
About.intro: ZYGSOFT is a software and digital transformation company based in Antalya, Turkey. We deliver corporate web platforms, SaaS applications, custom software systems, and digital marketing services. We treat technology not merely as a tool but as a strategic language that enables businesses to grow, automate operations, and stand out in a competitive market.
About.missionDesc: We help businesses complete their digital transformation fully and sustainably. From software architecture and user interfaces to automation systems and performance marketing, we build solutions that create measurable value at every stage. Our goal is not just to build things that look good, but digital systems that genuinely work.
About.visionDesc: At the intersection of technology and design, we build digital infrastructure that gives businesses a lasting competitive advantage. We hold product quality, development transparency, and delivery consistency as core principles. Every project is conducted as a partnership where we treat our clients' success as our own.
About.ctaBox: Let's build powerful digital systems together.
About.teamSubtitle: We bring every project to life through technical depth, design precision, and strategic thinking.
About.bioP1: I'm Gürkan Yavuz, a graduate of Akdeniz University Computer Programming. I build digital platforms that deliver real business value by combining software architecture with user experience design.
About.bioP2: I work on corporate web applications, SaaS platforms and automation systems using Next.js, React, TypeScript and Node.js. I prioritise performance, security and scalability in every project. Code quality and architectural clarity are non-negotiable parts of my development process.
About.bioP3: Beyond software, I believe design and functionality must be fully integrated. By weaving elements such as colour systems, typography and interface flow into the development process, I produce products that are both technically sound and visually consistent.
About.quote: I see technology not just as a tool, but as a language that shapes the future of businesses.

Contact.subtitle: Planning a new project? Looking to improve an existing system? Or just want to explore ideas? Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you within 1 business day.

Contact.formPrivacyNote: Submitted information is used only to respond to your inquiry and is not shared with third parties.
Contact.faqDesc: The most common questions about our services, process, and pricing.
Contact.faqQ1: What kinds of enquiries can I send?
Contact.faqA1: You can reach us about web or application development, SaaS platform design, automation systems, social media management, digital marketing, brand identity and logo design, UDF legal tools, or general digital transformation consulting.
Contact.faqA2: Yes, completely. Project evaluation and initial consultation are free of charge. Once we understand your project and clarify the scope, we provide a tailored proposal — requesting a quote creates no obligation.
Contact.faqQ3: How does the payment process work for SaaS products?
Contact.faqA3: Create your free account, send the amount for your selected package via wire transfer/EFT, and upload the receipt through the system. Our team approves it promptly and your panel is activated immediately.

AppStore.storeDesc: From legal technology to corporate web platforms, social media management to brand design — explore our SaaS products and software packages that accelerate your operations. Create your account, notify us of your payment, and your panel is activated in minutes.

AppStore.howItWorksTitle: How Does the Payment Process Work?
AppStore.step1: Create your free account — no credit card required.
AppStore.step2: Send the amount for your selected package via Wire Transfer or EFT to our bank account.
AppStore.step3: Log in to your user panel and upload your receipt to submit a Payment Notification.
AppStore.step4: Our team confirms your receipt promptly and your service is activated immediately.

services.legalToolkitDesc: Professional document processing toolkit for UYAP and legal workflows. One annual subscription, all tools included.

services.legalToolkitProductSecurity: Your documents are permanently deleted from our servers once processing is complete. KVKK-compliant, privacy-first infrastructure.
services.legalToolkitValueProp: One yearly payment, unlimited access to all tools. No separate purchases.
